issue-ac449148-adw-3f228a76-sdlc_planner-remove-ctas-photoshop-plans.md # Plan: Remove CTAs from Photoshop Plans page ## Task Description Remove all Call-to-Action (CTA) elements from the Photoshop Plans page. CTAs are defined as: - `` elements with action labels (e.g. "Buy now") - Their containing `
` wrapper if it serves no other purpose after removal The target page is the plans test/demo HTML file that renders Photoshop plan card templates. The `footer` slot and its checkout-link buttons must be removed from all photoshop-related templates. Informational content (pricing, descriptions, icons) must be preserved. ## Relevant Files - `web-components/test/merch-card.plans.test.html` — Main target: contains `photoshop` and `photoshop-with-addon` templates, each with a `
` holding a "Buy now" `` CTA. These are the CTAs to remove. - `web-components/src/variants/plans.js` — Read to understand `PLANS_AEM_FRAGMENT_MAPPING.ctas` slot mapping (footer slot). No changes needed here unless the mapping itself drives CTA rendering for the target page. - `web-components/test/mocks/sites/fragments/fragment-photoshop.json` — Mock AEM fragment with `ctas` field containing a "Buy now" checkout-link. May need the `ctas` field emptied if it drives CTA rendering on the plans page. - `web-components/test/mocks/sites/fragments/fragment-photography-plans.json` — Check for CTA field, remove if present. ## Step by Step Tasks ### 1. tool_input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(plans): remove CTAs from Photoshop Plans page

Remove all CTA elements (Buy now checkout-link buttons and their footer
slot wrappers) from the photoshop and photoshop-with-addon templates.
Also clear the ctas field in fragment-photoshop.json and
fragment-photography-plans.json mock fragments to prevent
fragment-driven CTA rendering.

Closes #14

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

tool_input.command:
gh pr create \
  --title "feat(plans): remove CTAs from Photoshop Plans page" \
  --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Remove `<div slot="footer">` CTA blocks (Buy now checkout-link buttons) from `photoshop` and `photoshop-with-addon` templates in `merch-card.plans.test.html`
- Clear the `ctas` field in `fragment-photoshop.json` and `fragment-photography-plans.json` mock fragments to prevent fragment-driven CTA rendering
- Informational content (icons, headings, pricing, descriptions, addon) preserved unchanged

## Issue
Closes #14

## Test plan
- [ ] `photoshop` template renders without a footer/CTA button
- [ ] `photoshop-with-addon` template renders without a footer/CTA button
- [ ] Fragment-driven plans cards for photoshop show no Buy now button
- [ ] All other plan card content (pricing, descriptions, icons) unchanged

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)" \
  --base main
